title: MagaFinz's Fluid Jars
description: A Resource Pack for Create: Factory Logistics, that retextures the Fluid Jars, and the bottler. Designed by MagaFinz
body:
> ⚠️ **Archived Notice**  
> Due to *Create: Factory Logistics* being archived, this project is now also archived.  
> Check out **Create Repackaged** instead: https://modrinth.com/mod/repackaged  

![Texture Showcase & Pack Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cbfbff696e2c22d4fed2c908c67b86abc5b0b56.png)

<details>
<summary>Image Contents</summary>

A simple resource pack that retextures the fluid jars **and the bottler** from the [*Create: Factory Logistics*](https://modrinth.com/mod/create_factory_logistics) mod to better match your factory aesthetic. Clean, readable, and designed to blend seamlessly with other Create-style builds.

**Designed by:** [MagaFinz](https://modrinth.com/user/Magafin)  
**Developed & Uploaded by:** [swzo](https://modrinth.com/user/swzo)  

**Dependencies:** Requires [*Create: Factory Logistics*](https://modrinth.com/mod/create_factory_logistics)

</details>
